identity.name: DreamerZ_Beta
identity.tone: Premium, Trustworthy, Future-Forward, Teen-Friendly (but not childish)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:shadow-primary/30 hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-foreground border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-foreground h-10 px-4 rounded-full

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 group
cards.glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/50 shadow-lg rounded-2xl

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: REMOVE all 'Neo-Brutalist' styles (thick black borders, hard shadows).
Use the 'Glassmorphism' style for the Prompt Lab and overlays.
Ensure the design feels 'Premium' (lots of white space, subtle shadows, refined typography).
Use 'Indian' context images where appropriate to match the target audience.
Implement 'Bento' grids for the dashboard layout.
Keep the existing functionality but completely overhaul the CSS/Tailwind classes.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text unless it's a very subtle brand moment.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
